mano_cua.result_summary: 页面正常加载无白屏，Vuetify 组件全部正常渲染（按钮、图标、下拉选择器、文本输入框、复选框、日历组件）。Console 面板显示 No Issues，无 JS 解析错误。语言切换下拉菜单可用但不包含法语（fr）选项（playground 配置限制，仅有阿拉伯语、英语、西班牙语），法语切换测试无法执行。核心渲染功能正常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Page loads normally, all Vuetify components render correctly. Console shows No Issues - no JS parsing errors related to single quotes or character escaping. Language selector works but French is not configured in playground locale options. Core rendering verified normal.
